feat.name: Tongue Tether
feat.text: Your tongue can momentarily latch on as readily as your hands. So long as you can freely open your mouth, you do not need free hands in order to Disarm, Grab an Edge, Reposition, or Trip. If you have the Long Tongue feat, you can Disarm, Grab an Edge, Reposition, and Trip with your tongue at a distance that is 5 feet beyond your normal reach.

traits.name: Tripkee
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the tripkee ancestry. Tripkees are a family of froglike humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by tripkees. An item with this trait is created and used by tripkees.
